data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims on behalf of investors of Jasper between Nov 30, 2023 and July 3, 2025.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Jasper to reach out to him for a discussion of their options. If you bought or obtained securities in Jasper from November 30, 2023, to July 3, 2025, and wish to explore potential remedies, contact James directly.

data.title: Itaú Chile (SSE: ITAUCL) to release Q3 2025 results on Oct 30, after market opens in Santiago.
data.description: Today, BANCO ITAÚ CHILE (SSE: ITAUCL) revealed that their financial results for the third quarter ending September 30, 2025, will be made public on October 30, 2025. The report is scheduled to be released before the market hours in Santiago.

data.title: PharmaCorp corrects Q2 2025 financial statements; no impact on financial position. Audit led to restated filings.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, PharmaCorp Rx Inc. announced the restatement and refiling of its financial statements for the interim period ending on June 30, 2025. The company, trading under the symbol TSXV: PCRX, made certain accounting adjustments as a result of a review by its Auditor. The amended Q2 2025 statements and management's discussion and analysis can be found on PharmaCorp’s profile on www.sedarplus.ca. It was clarified that these adjustments do not impact PharmaCorp’s financial position.

If you bought or obtained securities in Charter between July 26, 2024, and July 24, 2025, and wish to review your options, Wilson is available for consultation.

data.title: MindClay to debut Interactive Museum Wellness Lounge at Behavioral Health Tech 2025 in San Diego, providing immersive wellness experience for attendees.
data.description: MindClay is providing attendees at the Behavioral Health Tech 2025 Conference in Los Angeles with a unique opportunity to experience the Interactive Museum Wellness Lounge. This innovative space offers a one-of-a-kind immersion into wellness practices. The event is scheduled for October 10, 2025, and will feature a range of engaging activities and experiences aimed at promoting mental and physical well-being. This initiative aims to enhance the conference experience for participants, with the Interactive Museum Wellness Lounge serving as a highlight of the event.

data.title: GlobalTech partners with World Mobile Chain to utilize its blockchain for infrastructure, aiming to expand digital services.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, GlobalTech Corporation (OTC ID: GTLK), a technology holding company in the U.S. focusing on artificial intelligence, big data, and emerging technologies, revealed a strategic partnership with World Mobile Chain (WMC), identified as the inaugural blockchain for decentralized physical infrastructure networks (DePIN). Through this collaboration, GlobalTech plans to implement WMC’s blockchain framework to introduce innovative digital services throughout its worldwide activities.

data.title: 18th Street Design Collective showcases Nabys Vielman’s S/S 2026 collection at NYFW in Eichholtz Manhattan during Sept 11, 2025, celebration of fashion, design, and art in Chelsea.
data.description: In the vibrant neighborhood of Chelsea, a festive event highlighting fashion, design, and artistry took place on October 10, 2025. The 18th Street Design Collective organized an exclusive exhibition during New York Fashion Week on September 11, 2025. This showcase featured the highly anticipated Spring/Summer 2026 collection created by designer Nabys Vielman. The event attracted a significant audience and showcased the latest trends and creations in the industry.

data.title: Trump announces 100% tariffs on all goods from China, causing crypto and stocks to drop. Trade tensions escalate with new export restrictions on critical software. China plans export restrictions on all products, even those not manufactured.
data.description: President Donald Trump announced on Friday that effective November 1st, the United States will impose new 100% tariffs on goods imported from China, in addition to existing tariffs. Trump also revealed that export restrictions on all critical software sent abroad will be implemented. This decision comes amidst escalating trade tensions between the two countries. The president highlighted China's plans to enforce extensive export limitations on virtually all their products, including ones they don't produce. He characterized this move as unprecedented in global trade, impacting all nations, and perceived it as a strategic and aggressive maneuver by China. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: South Coast AQMD issues violations to two Paramount facilities for elevated hexavalent chromium levels; additional monitoring conducted.
data.description: In Diamond Bar, California on October 10, 2025, the South Coast Air Quality Management District (South Coast AQMD) performed extra air monitoring and testing. They have given Notices of Violations (NOVs) to two metal casting plants in Paramount, California, known as Pro Cast Industries.

data.title: Stock market dives after Trump announces 100% China tariff. Oracle, Tesla, Taiwan Semi in focus. 100 characters.
data.description: After the stock market experienced a sharp decline, President Trump announced significant tariffs on China, causing further turmoil. On the upcoming agenda are reports from notable companies such as Oracle, JPMorgan, and Taiwan Semiconductor. Investors are also closely monitoring Tesla's performance, examining if its chart indicates a stable trajectory. Trump's decision to impose tariffs of up to 100% on Chinese goods sent shockwaves through the market, leading to increased uncertainty. The latest developments have drawn intense focus on the aforementioned companies and their potential market impact.

data.title: President Trump warns of imposing 100% tariffs on Chinese goods following Beijing's export restrictions on rare earth minerals.
data.description: Following Beijing's implementation of new regulations limiting the export of rare earth minerals, crucial components used by U.S. chip and battery manufacturers, the president issued a warning. The threat was made in response to these restrictions imposed by China, a significant supplier of rare earth minerals. These minerals are essential for the production of chips and batteries in the U.S., with approximately X% of the country's supply coming from China. This move by Beijing could potentially impact the semiconductor and electric vehicle industries, which heavily rely on these minerals for their production processes.

data.title: AI Technology Group to acquire AVM Biotechnology, merger agreement signed on July 31, 2025 - pending regulatory approval.
data.description: In Reno, Nevada on October 10, 2025, AI Technology Group Inc. (OTCID: AIPG) announced the filing of an amended Form 10 with the Securities and Exchange Commission. The company has entered a definitive agreement dated July 31, 2025, to acquire AVM Biotechnology Inc. The agreement outlines that a new subsidiary of Ai Technology Group will merge with AVM, making AVM a wholly owned subsidiary upon closing, subject to standard closing conditions detailed in the filing. Post-closing, the Company plans to change its corporate name and ticker symbol to better reflect the combined entity, pending regulatory approval.
